name: Code Debugging
description: 代码调试:定位 bug、断点与问题复现

detector.inline: profile.task_kind === 'debug' || profile.code_domains.includes('debugging') || profile.round_signals.some(s => /\b(error|stack|trace|crash|repro|regression)\b/i.test(s)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s => /\b(stack ?trace|traceback|reproduce (the )?(crash|bug|issue|error|failure)|repro(duction)? steps?|root cause|segfault|core dump|null pointer|stack overflow|race condition|heisenbug|intermittent (failure|crash)|debug (the )?(crash|failure|panic)|why (is|does) .* (crash|fail|throw|hang))\b|复现(崩溃|问题|错误)|崩溃原因|根因分析|堆栈跟踪/i.test(s)) ? 0.88 : 0
